message:
style: workspace-wide rustfmt sweep across connectors + crates

Pure formatting pass applying the workspace rustfmt.toml style to the
bulk of the tree so future diffs stop being dominated by "your editor
disagrees with mine" churn. Zero behavior changes, zero API changes,
zero new tests - the resulting binaries should be byte-identical and
all existing test assertions still hold.

The dominant shape changes rustfmt applied:

- Break chained method calls across lines when a single-line form
  exceeds max_width (seen across the Anthropic, AWS, S3, Sentry,
  Grafana, Teams, Telegram, Segment, Discord, Elasticsearch,
  PostHog, PayPal, Zapier, Todoist, BigQuery, and Annas Archive
  connectors plus a dozen fcp-* crates).
- Split long if-let / match-guard expressions so the condition sits
  on one line and the body on the next (fcp-audit, fcp-core,
  fcp-host, fcp-kernel, fcp-policy, fcp-sandbox).
- Prefer multi-line form for assert / assert_eq / assert! macros whose
  message argument would otherwise push the assertion past max_width
  (fcp-sdk, fcp-conformance, fcp-bootstrap, fcp-raptorq).
- Collapse single-entry BTreeMap::from([...]) constructors whose
  contents fit on one logical line into the tupled-tuple form
  rustfmt prefers (fcp-sdk sigv4 tests).
- Fold empty-body function stubs onto their brace line where rustfmt
  expects them (fcp-kernel lifecycle tests).
- Split long fn signatures whose arg list overflows max_width onto
  one-arg-per-line (fcp-store gc, fcp-sdk runtime, fwc new_cmd).
- Collapse contiguous `write_generator_fixture_json(` call lines whose
  args actually fit on one line back onto one line (fwc new_cmd
  truthful streaming / webhook / poll scaffold tests).
- Normalize minor whitespace: no trailing blank line inside the
  final tests module of several sdk_* test files.

No file in this commit changes any logic, control flow, trait bound,
generic parameter, type signature, constant value, or runtime
behavior. The only files with substantive changes in this dirty
working tree landed in the preceding three commits (fcp-store
durable stores, fcp-audit golden snapshots, fuzz harnesses).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -357,12 +357,11 @@ impl std::fmt::Debug for GoogleAuthSource {
                 .debug_struct("CredentialId")
                 .field("credential_id", credential_id)
                 .finish(),
-            Self::OAuthRefresh(source) => {
-                f.debug_tuple("OAuthRefresh").field(source).finish()
-            }
-            Self::CredentialsFile { path } => {
-                f.debug_struct("CredentialsFile").field("path", path).finish()
-            }
+            Self::OAuthRefresh(source) => f.debug_tuple("OAuthRefresh").field(source).finish(),
+            Self::CredentialsFile { path } => f
+                .debug_struct("CredentialsFile")
+                .field("path", path)
+                .finish(),
             Self::EncryptedLocalCredentials { profile } => f
                 .debug_struct("EncryptedLocalCredentials")
                 .field("profile", profile)
